dashboard.label: Upload History
dashboard.description: Historical record of all checklist uploads — track compliance progress over time

search.query: | dedup upload_batch_id | stats count(eval(source_format="ckl")) AS CKL, count(eval(source_format="cklb")) AS CKLB | eval display=CKL." CKL / ".CKLB." CKLB" | table display

panel.title: Open Findings Trend by Assessment Date

search.query: | dedup upload_batch_id, asset_host_name, stig_title, vuln_vuln_num | eval assessment_date=strftime(strptime(assessment_time, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%6NZ"), "%Y-%m-%d") | stats count(eval(vuln_status="Open")) AS open_findings, count(eval(vuln_status="NotAFinding" OR vuln_status="Not_Applicable")) AS compliant, count AS total by assessment_date | eval compliance_pct=round((compliant/total)*100, 1) | sort assessment_date

| dedup upload_batch_id, asset_host_name, stig_title, vuln_vuln_num | eval assessment_date=strftime(strptime(assessment_time, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%6NZ"), "%Y-%m-%d") | stats count(eval(vuln_status="Open")) AS open_findings, count AS total by assessment_date, asset_host_name | eval compliance_pct=round(((total-open_findings)/total)*100, 1) | chart values(compliance_pct) over assessment_date by asset_host_name

| dedup upload_batch_id | eval upload_date=strftime(strptime(upload_time, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%6NZ"), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval format=upper(source_format) | table upload_date, asset_host_name, stig_title, source_file, format, upload_batch_id | rename upload_date AS "Upload Date", asset_host_name AS "Host", stig_title AS "STIG", source_file AS "File", format AS "Format", upload_batch_id AS "Batch ID" | sort - "Upload Date"

panel.title: Finding Status Snapshot per Assessment (by Host)

search.query: | dedup upload_batch_id, asset_host_name, stig_title, vuln_vuln_num | eval assessment_date=strftime(strptime(assessment_time, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%6NZ"), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | stats count(eval(vuln_status="Open")) AS "Open", count(eval(vuln_status="Open" AND category="CAT I")) AS "CAT I Open", count(eval(vuln_status="Open" AND category="CAT II")) AS "CAT II Open", count(eval(vuln_status="Open" AND category="CAT III")) AS "CAT III Open", count(eval(vuln_status="NotAFinding" OR vuln_status="Not_Applicable")) AS "Compliant", count AS "Total" by assessment_date, asset_host_name, stig_title | eval "Compliance %"=round((Compliant/Total)*100, 1) | eval "Risk Score"=('CAT I Open'*10)+('CAT II Open'*5)+('CAT III Open'*1) | rename assessment_date AS "Assessment Date", asset_host_name AS "Host", stig_title AS "STIG" | sort - "Assessment Date"
